payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark reddish-brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door shown in a vertical crop; matte finish with a rectangular inner panel, minor scuffs and small chip at the top-left, edges slightly cropped — appears photographed close (≈1.0 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wood cabinet door edge-crop","long_description":"Tall, narrow dark reddish-brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door shown in a vertical crop; matte finish with a rectangular inner panel, minor scuffs and small chip at the top-left, edges slightly cropped — appears photographed close (≈1.0 m from camera).","attributes":["dark reddish-brown wood","recessed rectangular panel","vertical narrow shape","matte/dull finish","minor scuffs and scratches","small chip at top-left","edges slightly cropped","no visible hardware"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
